3108090.name: Starzelia
3108090.description:
Welcome to Starzelia, an immersive open-world adventure game where you capture and command powerful creatures known as Starzels. In Starzelia, you’ll explore vast landscapes, discover hidden secrets, and build a team of unique Starzels, each with its own special abilities and strategic advantages.

Once captured, Starzels aren't just friends—they become central to your battle strategy. Engage in thrilling real-time strategy battles, using your Starzels’ unique abilities to outmaneuver and outsmart your opponents. Plan your tactics, deploy your Starzels strategically, and lead your team to victory.

With a rich storyline, captivating environments, and an array of Starzels to discover, Starzelia offers endless opportunities for exploration and combat. Train your Starzels, develop your strategies, and challenge other players to see who has the skills to become the new Starzel champion. Are you ready to embark on this epic journey and claim your title? The world of Starzelia awaits!
3108090.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
